description: CompositionWashed blue cotton jeans, has two front pockets with a patch pocket above the right one, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered branding, creased touch, zipper fly and button closure, and belt loops on the waistFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in warm water with like colours only, using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm ironTake edgy dressing to the next level in these blue jeans from spykar. Perfect for casual outings, this pair looks great with grunge tees, leather vests and leather boots.Model statisticsThe model wears jeans of length 41.5"Height-6.1' Waist-31"
